mood: Calm but Structured. Approachable yet Academic.
core_principles: Neo-Brutalist Academic: Combine soft pastel backgrounds to lower cognitive load with hard, high-contrast borders (2px solid black) for intense structural focus.
Focus First: The UI should feel like a 'workspace' not a feed. Everything non-essential should be collapsible or secondary.
Bento Grids: Use asymmetric grids for the marketing page and dense 'Control Room' grids for the student dashboard.
Visual Hierarchy over Decorative Polish: Use size, weight, and hard shadows to define priority. Avoid muddy gradients.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist - High contrast between expressive display and sterile structural text.
rules: DO NOT use generic sans fonts like Inter or Roboto for headings.
Headings must have tight letter spacing.
Hierarchy gap rule: Do not jump more than 2 steps in sizes.
All containers and cards must have a solid 2px border using the border color.
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. The text primary is #111111.
No full-screen gradients. Keep colors flat and structural.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (use generous spacing inside cards)
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical layouts, mixed block sizes, heavy use of gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. 3 or 4 columns, tight gap-4 or gap-6. Highly scannable.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have generous padding (p-6 or p-8).
Dashboard: use a collapsible left sidebar to minimize distraction.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized with Neo-Brutalist styles.

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111] rounded-none md:rounded-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#111111]

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white font-bold border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-none md:rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111111] font-bold border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-none md:rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#FFF9E6] transition-all shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111]

inputs.style: border-2 border-[#111111] rounded-none md:rounded-md focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#FF4D4D] focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#FF4D4D] transition-all bg-white p-3

focus_mode.style: Absolute minimalist canvas. Hide all global navigation. Show only a massive countdown timer and the current task. Background transforms to #111111 and text to #FBF9F6 for deep focus.

rules: No slow, airy transitions. Use fast, snappy movements (150ms-200ms).
Hovering interactive elements should instantly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase the brutalist shadow.
Focus states must be highly visible and high-contrast.

icons.style: Duotone or Bold weight. Must match the solid, structured feel of the UI.

hero_image.description: Minimalist floating book staircase. Use in Marketing landing page hero section. Add a light pastel background.

math_science_abstract.description: Abstract Math & Science sphere art. Use for Science/Math subject cards or AI tutor background.

history_english_abstract.description: Abstract Roman column / Literature art. Use for English/History subject category cards.

pe_abstract.description: Dynamic PE bouncing sphere. Use for Physical Education category.

student_focused.description: Student studying. Use as an accent image in the marketing section (e.g., 'Trusted by students' or 'Focus mode').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use custom Shadcn components: customize them deeply by adding `border-2 border-[#111111]` and `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111]` across cards, buttons, dialogs.
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Configure tailwind.config.js to load 'Cabinet Grotesk' for sans/headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.

For the Focus Mode: Render it as a full-screen overlay/route that hides the sidebar and navigation, showing only the timer, exit lock button, and current task. The background should be dark #111111 for deep focus, reversing the color scheme temporarily.
Subject colors mapping: Math/Science -> Mint (#E6F7EB), History/English -> Lavender (#EBE6F7), PE -> Peach (#FFD8D1), General -> Butter Yellow (#FFF9E6).
